ios.build: export APP_VARIANT=e2e CI=1 EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_VARIANT=e2e EXPO_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_API_KEY="" EXPO_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_HOST="${EXPO_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_HOST:-https://us.i.posthog.com}" EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL="${EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:4040}" EXPO_PUBLIC_MOBILE_PASSKEY_ENABLED="${EXPO_PUBLIC_MOBILE_PASSKEY_ENABLED:-false}"; rm -rf ios/build && pnpm exec expo prebuild --platform ios --clean && xcodebuild -workspace ios/HakumiE2E.xcworkspace -scheme HakumiE2E -configuration Release -sdk iphonesimulator -derivedDataPath ios/build
